message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.fromiter passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-1nqd)

Expose fnp_python.fromiter delegating to
numpy.fromiter(iter, dtype, count=-1, *, like=None). dtype is required.
Parity oracle test covers:
- list input with float64 dtype
- explicit int32 dtype coercion
- Python generator expression consumption
- count-limited generator consumption
- empty iterable yields zero-element ndarray
- short-iterator (count > len) success/error surface parity
- non-iterable TypeError surface parity
